race.comment: Competitive contest with the two-year-olds stepping out to the 1600m for the first time. HYDROBOMB (1) back in grade when he rounded them up with ridiculous ease to score over 1400m at Sandown-Lakeside. Can race closer from the good draw and prove hard to get past. STITZER (5) slashing debut when he savaged the line to run sixth over 1400m in the G3 The TL Baillieu Handicap at Rosehill. Ready for this trip and further and Lloyd sticks from a better gate. Genuine contender. SUMAC (8) nice filly improving with racing. Saved a stack of ground along the inside with a tenacious fifth over 1400m in the G3 The TL Baillieu Handicap at Rosehill. Desperate for the trip and sure to be thereabouts. DIAMETER (3) struggling to draw a decent barrier and today is no different. Comes here fourth-up and can get cover from the barrier. Each-way. AM I DREAMING (2) excellent debut win, then never looked a genuine chance when eleventh in the G1 Sires' Produce over 1400m here last Saturday. Improver.
